Trigger/Action: TRIGGER: Contact enters nurture stage OR Behavior detected OR Time-based schedule OR Manual enrollment
Tool/System: Marketing automation platform / Behavioral trigger / Scheduled workflow

Trigger/Action: Segment contacts by persona, stage, industry, engagement level, preferences
Tool/System: CRM segmentation / CDP (Segment, mParticle) / List management
Data_Fields: persona_type, buyer_stage, industry, company_size, engagement_tier, time_zone

Trigger/Action: Select appropriate nurture track (awareness, consideration, decision, retention)
Personalize content dynamically per contact (name, company, pain points, interests)
Tool/System: Liquid/Handlebars templating / Dynamic content blocks / AI content engine

Trigger/Action: AI-optimize send time and channel (email vs SMS) based on individual engagement history
Tool/System: Send-time optimization AI (Seventh Sense, Mailchimp) / Channel preference

Trigger/Action: Send first touchpoint in sequence with relevant educational or promotional content
Track delivery, opens, clicks, replies, SMS responses in real-time
Tool/System: Email/SMS analytics / Engagement tracking / Link tracking
Data_Fields: delivered_status, open_count, click_count, reply_flag, sms_response, bounce_type

Trigger/Action: DECISION: Positive engagement detected (clicked, replied, visited key page)?
Tool/System: Click tracking / Webhook listener / Behavioral trigger detection

Trigger/Action: IF YES: Advance to next stage or trigger conversion workflow
Tool/System: Stage progression rules / Lead scoring update / Conversion handoff

Trigger/Action: IF NO: Continue sequence OR try alternative content/channel
Tool/System: Workflow branching / Wait steps / If/then logic / Multi-path journeys

Trigger/Action: Monitor engagement patterns and identify contacts going cold (no opens for 14+ days)
Tool/System: Engagement decay scoring / Inactivity alerts / Cold lead detector

Trigger/Action: Trigger re-engagement campaigns with new angles or special offers for cold contacts
Tool/System: Win-back campaigns / New content alerts / Limited-time offer sequences

Trigger/Action: Update contact profile with engagement preferences and content interests for future personalization
Tool/System: Contact property updates / Preference center / Interest tagging

Trigger/Action: Generate nurture performance reports (open rates, CTR, progression rates, conversion attribution)
Tool/System: Campaign analytics / Attribution reporting / Cohort analysis / A/B test results
